en.title: Teaching {{Assistant}} Intern
en.text: Provided technical guidance and mentorship to students learning [[Data Structures and Algorithms]].
list: Resolved 500+ queries on Data Structures and Algorithms with optimized, well-explained solutions
Achieved a 4.73/5 instructor rating for consistent, high-quality technical guidance
Helped students debug complex problems and understand algorithmic thinking

en.title: Software Development {{Engineer}}
en.text: Building large-scale, fault-tolerant backend infrastructure for India's largest telecom. Key contributions include:
list: Designed and implemented a Go-based DCIM system managing 10,000+ servers, replacing Excel-based workflows and reducing manual inventory updates by 70%
Authored HLD and LLD for DCIM and IPAM systems using Domain-Driven Design to improve implementation speed and maintainability
Designed fault-tolerant, event-driven distributed workflow orchestration using Temporal, enabling automatic retries and 100% reliability for critical services
Designed and integrated a centralized IAM system using OAuth2/OIDC (Keycloak) and OpenFGA, enabling fine-grained RBAC and ABAC across 5+ services with JWT-based auth
Improved DCIM API latency by 30% by parallelizing external I/O calls using goroutines, eliminating sequential bottlenecks
Built an IPAM service in Go with PostgreSQL, automating subnet registration and IPv4/IPv6 allocation, reducing allocation effort by 80%
Designed, deployed, and managed cloud-native microservices using Docker and Kubernetes with rolling updates and PVC-backed storage
